overall.description: A cinematic first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk industrial alley during a heavy rainstorm at dawn. The player navigates through narrow metal-grated passages past seated NPCs, through industrial pipe zones, and into wider concrete courtyards with scaffolding and neon signage, eventually following a woman through an industrial walkway.

segments.scene_description: Moving through an industrial zone dominated by a massive cyan-lit pipe overhead, the camera passes a vendor at a food stall and a cluttered living area with a leather couch and barrels. The environment transitions from enclosed alley to a more open concrete area.

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the woman through a covered industrial walkway featuring red neon lights overhead and metal pipe bridges. Other pedestrians appear in the distance as the path continues through the rain-soaked industrial complex toward a brighter exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked industrial alley that gradually expands from a narrow, neon-lit corridor into a more open concrete zone. It begins in a tight space where red neon light reflects off wet metal grating, moving forward toward two figures seated at a table. As the camera passes the NPCs and a graffiti-covered door, the enclosed alleyway opens up to reveal a massive cyan-lit pipe dominating the overhead space. The scene then shifts through a cluttered industrial area, passing a food stall and a makeshift living space with a leather couch and barrels, before finally emerging into a wider concrete courtyard.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open industrial courtyard into a narrow, neon-lit covered walkway. It begins in a wide concrete space surrounded by scaffolding and overhead catwalks, where a green neon sign glows on the left as the camera tracks a woman in a blue dress under a rainy dawn sky. As she moves toward a distant exit, the environment shifts from the open air into a sheltered industrial corridor. The scene then transitions into a sequence of red neon lights and metal pipe bridges, passing other distant pedestrians within the rain-soaked complex. The camera finally follows the woman deeper into the structure, moving toward a brighter light at the end of the walkway.
